report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Hyperliquid Trading Guide (3500+ words) and FOMC & Crypto Guide (2800+ words, timely for March 17-18 FOMC) — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Hyperliquid: #1 perps DEX, 70%+ market share, $45B daily volume peaks, $4.5B TVL, 311 pairs, HYPE $38-39 (~$10B mcap), HyperCore buyback launched March 13
FOMC March 17-18: Fed expected to hold at 3.50-3.75% (92% prob), first meeting responding to Iran oil shock + tariffs, dot plot release, BTC sell-the-news pattern
Gap analysis: 1,055 pages built, 377 published — no Hyperliquid learn guide or FOMC/macro guide despite high search intent

sections.title: Content Created
items: Hyperliquid Trading Guide (3500+ words): Architecture deep dive, step-by-step onboarding, perpetual mechanics, spot trading & HIP standards, HYPE tokenomics, vs CEXs comparison, risk analysis, 6 FAQs

FOMC & Crypto Guide (2800+ words): Rate mechanics, March 2026 preview, sell-the-news pattern with data table, three price scenarios, Bitcoin ETF factor, macro risks, Powell-to-Warsh transition, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Hyperliquid: title under 60 chars, Article + FAQ schema (6 Qs), OG/Twitter cards, 5 internal links
FOMC: title under 60 chars, Article + FAQ schema (6 Qs), OG/Twitter cards, 5 internal links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
TypeScript verified — no errors from new files
